title: ViaziLink
summary: A mobile platform connecting potato farmers directly with buyers and exposing real-time market prices.
overview: ViaziLink was built to reduce reliance on middlemen by giving farmers and buyers a direct digital channel.
problem: Potato farmers often lacked direct buyer access and transparent pricing, reducing income reliability.
role: Built Android product flows for farmer and buyer journeys in Kotlin.
Worked on authentication, cloud-backed data handling, and marketplace interaction design.
architecture: Jetpack Compose UI for mobile-first farmer and buyer workflows.
Firebase Authentication and Cloud Firestore for access control and marketplace data.
Hilt, DataStore, and Coil for dependency injection, local preferences, and image handling.

results.title: Pilot status
results.detail: Pilot phase completed and currently being refined for wider release.

results.title: Income projection
results.detail: Projected to improve farmer income by 20 to 30 percent through better market access.

lessonsLearned: Farmer-facing products need simple flows and trust-building transparency around price data.
